cn_title: 微软回应《天外世界》「免费」升级争议
opus_summary: Obsidian原本承诺5月27日前拥有《天外世界》基础版的玩家可免费升级至「太空人之选版」，但实际操作中Xbox One和PS4数字版玩家被要求同时拥有DLC才能升级，引发社区强烈不满。微软已道歉并承诺为受影响玩家「妥善解决」。

paragraphs.en: The Outer Worlds developer, Obsidian, has apologized for any "confusion" after players complained that the studio reneged on a prior update stating that anyone with the base game in their libraries before May 27 could upgrade to the Spacer's Choice Edition for free.
paragraphs.cn: 《天外世界》开发商Obsidian就造成的「困惑」致歉——此前有玩家投诉称，工作室违背了先前的声明：在5月27日前拥有基础版的玩家可以免费升级至「太空人之选版」。

paragraphs.en: At the beginning of the month, seven years after it launched — and almost six months after its sequel was released — The Outer Worlds developer Obsidian confirmed it would "be pushing a couple of updates to The Outer Worlds" — the first since June 2023 — before revealing that, from May 27, the base game edition of The Outer Worlds would be delisted, leaving just the Spacer's Choice Edition.
paragraphs.cn: 本月初，距游戏发售七年、续作上线近半年后，Obsidian确认将「为《天外世界》推出几个更新」——这是自2023年6月以来的首次更新。随后他们宣布，5月27日起基础版将被下架，仅保留「太空人之选版」。

paragraphs.en: The team was quick to assure players that while this wouldn't impact anyone who already owned the base edition, it did mean that anyone looking to pick up the game on current-gen systems after May 27 will only get the newer edition. To sweeten the deal, though, those with the vanilla game on PC (Steam, GOG, or EGS), PS5, or Xbox Series X/S could upgrade to the Spacer's Choice Edition for free between now and May 27.
paragraphs.cn: 团队迅速向玩家保证，这不会影响已拥有基础版的玩家，但5月27日后想在当代主机购买的玩家只能获得新版本。作为福利，在PC（Steam、GOG或EGS）、PS5或Xbox Series X/S上拥有原版的玩家可在5月27日前免费升级至「太空人之选版」。

paragraphs.en: The offer was also extended to legacy systems, although to upgrade to the Spacer's Choice Edition from the base game on Xbox One and PlayStation 4, you will need to own the base game and both DLCs for The Outer Worlds.
paragraphs.cn: 优惠也延伸到了旧世代平台，不过在Xbox One和PlayStation 4上从基础版升级至「太空人之选版」，你需要同时拥有基础版和《天外世界》的两个DLC。

paragraphs.en: On the day the offer was supposed to go live, however, Twitterer/Xer Dominruro01 called out Obsidian publicly, writing "in the statement you posted on April 30, it said that if you only had the base game before today, they would give you the Spacers Choice version, and I bought it on May 13, and now it's asking me for the DLCs. I bought the digital PS4 version on PS5."
paragraphs.cn: 然而在优惠生效当天，推特/X用户Dominruro01公开质疑Obsidian：「你们4月30日发的声明说，如果在今天之前只有基础版就能免费获得太空人之选版。我5月13日买的，现在却要求我有DLC。我买的是PS5上的PS4数字版。」

paragraphs.en: Another player confirmed the same thing happened on Xbox, too.
paragraphs.cn: 另一位玩家确认Xbox上也出现了同样的问题。

paragraphs.en: Responding to the query, Obsidian wrote on Twitter/X: "Apologies for the confusion. Due to unforeseen platform limitations, Xbox One and PS4 digital owners will need to own both DLCs to be eligible for the upgrade. Please feel free to reach out to our support team for additional assistance."
paragraphs.cn: Obsidian在Twitter/X上回应道：「为造成的困惑致歉。由于不可预见的平台限制，Xbox One和PS4的数字版用户需要同时拥有两个DLC才有升级资格。如需进一步协助，请联系我们的客服团队。」

paragraphs.en: "This is considered a bait & switch in the U.S. and is absolutely illegal. But let's be real, accountability doesn't exist anymore," commented one unhappy player.
paragraphs.cn: 「这在美国属于诱导消费，完全违法。但说实话，问责已经不存在了，」一位不满的玩家评论道。

paragraphs.en: In a statement to IGN, a Microsoft spokesperson said: "The Outer Worlds Spacer's Choice Edition upgrade was intended to say 'thanks' to anyone who purchased The Outer Worlds base game by providing them a free upgrade to the newly improved version. However, due to various entitlement restrictions and backend issues, we weren't able to provide this as smoothly as we wished and our players are, rightfully, upset."
paragraphs.cn: 在向IGN的声明中，微软发言人表示：「《天外世界》太空人之选版升级的初衷是向所有购买了基础版的玩家说'谢谢'，为他们提供免费升级至改进版的机会。然而由于各种权限限制和后台问题，我们未能如愿顺利地提供这一服务，玩家的不满完全可以理解。」

paragraphs.en: "If you purchased the base game on Xbox One or PlayStation 4 between 4/30 and 5/27, or have any issues with the upgrade, please contact our support team and we'll work with you to make it right. Sorry again for the frustration around this."
paragraphs.cn: 「如果你在4月30日至5月27日期间在Xbox One或PlayStation 4上购买了基础版，或在升级中遇到任何问题，请联系我们的客服团队，我们会妥善解决。再次为此事带来的困扰致歉。」

subtitle: 说好的免费呢？
en_title: Microsoft Responds to The Outer Worlds 'Free' Upgrade Confusion
